overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dense, neon-lit urban alleyway at night. The player navigates multi-level metal walkways, ascends long concrete staircases between corrugated metal shacks, and finally emerges onto a street to enter a futuristic black sports car.

events.description: passes close to pedestrian in colorful jacket temporarily blocking right side of view

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, neon-lit alleyway with metal grating underfoot and corrugated metal shacks on both sides. The camera walks forward past wooden crates toward a wire fence gate, passing a pedestrian in a colorful jacket at close range around the 8-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway with metal stairs and barbed wire fencing

events.description: passes through metal gate from lower alley to upper elevated walkway
spunky monkey neon sign becomes visible illuminating the right side with purple light

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs and navigating upper level walkways with turns to the right

entered.detail: purple neon sign with monkey face logo reading 'SPUNKY MONKEY'
metal walkway bridge crossing overhead with barbed wire
rusted metal fence with barbed wire on top
steep metal staircase with railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The player ascends through a metal gate into an upper-level walkway system. The environment features barbed wire fencing and corrugated metal walls. Around 20 seconds, a bright purple 'SPUNKY MONKEY' neon sign becomes visible on the right, casting colored light on the metal stairs as the camera continues climbing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overhead structure with vending machines

events.description: descends to lower level with concrete surfaces and illuminated vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along upper walkway then descending to lower level with vending area

entered.detail: brightly lit vending machine with glowing screen
doorway illuminated with red neon light
paved concrete surface replacing metal grating

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an overhead walkway beneath a bridge structure, then descends to a lower level. The ground transitions from metal grating to concrete, and a brightly lit vending machine becomes visible on the left near a red-lit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: long concrete staircase between green walls with red lanterns

events.description: begins ascending long concrete staircase between enclosed walls

agents.ego_description: climbing long flight of concrete stairs following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket ascending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with many steps ascending between walls
concrete wall illuminated with green neon lighting
traditional red paper lanterns hanging above the stairs
wall covered in colorful graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: The player begins a long ascent up a concrete staircase enclosed by green-lit walls. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and graffiti covers the left wall. A pedestrian in a brown jacket is visible ahead, also climbing the stairs toward the street level above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with neon signs and parked sports car

events.description: emerges from enclosed stairwell onto open street level with visible sky
approaches and enters the black sports car

agents.ego_description: walking across the street toward the parked sports car and entering the driver's seat

entered.detail: futuristic black sports car with angular design and headlights on
multiple large neon billboards and building signage illuminating the street
tall street lamps casting light on the pavement

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto an open street, the scene reveals a wider urban environment with large neon billboards and building signs. The camera walks toward a futuristic black sports car parked on the left, enters the vehicle around the 60-second mark, and the view transitions to the car's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the depths of a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway up to a wide, futuristic city street. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor of corrugated metal shacks and wooden crates, passing a colorful pedestrian before ascending through a wire fence gate into a network of upper-level walkways. As the camera climbs, the environment shifts toward industrial metal stairs illuminated by a bright purple Spunky Monkey neon sign, eventually transitioning from metal grating to concrete as it passes a glowing vending machine. The scene then moves into a long ascent up a concrete stairwell enclosed by green-lit walls and red paper lanterns, following another pedestrian upward through graffiti-covered corridors. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairwell into the open urban expanse of large billboards and bright signs, walking directly toward a futuristic black sports car and transitioning into its interior.
